ABOUT_PAGE.STORY_TEXT: Etqan Code was founded to create a paradigm shift in digital education by providing powerful and secure educational platforms for teachers and institutions. We believe technology should be the strongest tool in a teacher's hand to easily reach thousands of students, while fully protecting their rights and efforts from any theft or leakage.
ABOUT_PAGE.VISION_TEXT: To be the first and most trusted technical partner for every teacher and educational institution in the Arab world.
ABOUT_PAGE.MISSION_TEXT: To deliver customized, fast, and highly secure platforms that guarantee a teaching experience free of technical complexities.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: Educational Platforms (LMS)
CATEGORIES.DESC: Integrated e-learning platforms specifically designed for teachers and centers to provide an exceptional and secure learning experience.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Mohamed Samy Platform
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Leaking educational content online and difficulty managing subscriptions of thousands of students.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Built an integrated LMS platform with video encryption to prevent downloading, and an auto-grading exam system.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Mr. Abdelmaseeh Platform
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Need for a robust educational platform customized for teaching high school physics with comprehensive exams.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Built a fully integrated platform to deliver specialized courses and interactive exams with student progress tracking.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Smart School App
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Poor communication between school and parents and no way to track attendance and grades instantly.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Interactive mobile app allowing parents to track their children instantly with smart notifications and absence management.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: Websites
CATEGORIES.DESC: Fast, responsive, and SEO-optimized websites for companies and organizations.

PROJECTS.TITLE: B2B E-commerce Platform
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Need an electronic platform to sell and distribute wholesale products to agents and pharmacies.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Built an advanced E-commerce platform supporting dynamic pricing for agents and integrated with the company's inventory system.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Consultancy Firm Official Website
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Old website doesn't reflect the company's professionalism and fails to convert visitors into clients.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Completely redesigned and rebuilt the website with a modern UI and simplified consultation booking system.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: Mobile App Development
CATEGORIES.DESC: Native, high-performance iOS and Android applications.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Logistics and Delivery App
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Delay in order tracking and difficulty for couriers to communicate with clients and manage delivery routes.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Developed a comprehensive mobile app for couriers and clients with live map tracking and smart routing.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Clinic Booking App
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Continuous crowding in waiting rooms and poor management of doctors' appointments.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: App allowing patients to book appointments, know their turn, and consult doctors remotely (Telehealth).

CATEGORIES.TITLE: ERP & Internal Systems
CATEGORIES.DESC: Enterprise resource management systems to transform paper work into an automated digital system.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Integrated ERP System
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Difficulty connecting different company departments and managing financial and human resources.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Built a custom ERP system connecting all departments with accurate analytical dashboards and real-time reports.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Real Estate Management System
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Difficulty tracking rent, maintenance, and contracts for a large number of properties.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Web platform to manage properties, automatic rent reminders, and a portal for tenants to submit maintenance requests.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: UI/UX Design
CATEGORIES.DESC: Attractive designs focused on improving user experience and achieving goals.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Banking App Redesign
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Complex user interface causing many customer complaints and low store ratings.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Conducted user research and completely re-engineered the app interface to be simpler, faster, and more secure.

CATEGORIES.TITLE: AI Solutions
CATEGORIES.DESC: Process automation and smart data analysis.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Smart Customer Service Chatbot
PROJECTS.PROBLEM: Massive pressure on the customer service team and delay in answering repeated inquiries.
PROJECTS.SOLUTION: Developed a Chatbot based on NLP to automatically reply to customers and solve 70% of problems without human intervention.
